problem id: 8e5d6fe6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND SHL(5)) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  11101110 -> 10011101
  01100111 -> 10001100
  10010110 -> 01010010
  11111110 -> 11011111
  11111011 -> 01111111
  10000101 -> 00010000
  10101111 -> 10110101
  00001001 -> 00100001
  00010000 -> 00000010
  11011100 -> 00011011

query: 00111100
predicted answer: 10000111
